title: I Updated /grill-me And Solved Claude Code
summary: Chase AI demonstrates grill-me-codex, a skill extension that adds verification capabilities to Claude Code projects. The tool builds on the grill-me foundation to validate whether Claude's code outputs are correct and make sense.
